decisions.decision: Used frozen=True on Competency dataclass to make it hashable for set usage in Question.competencies. Updated __init__.py files to export domain classes properly.
decisions.rationale: Used frozen=True on Competency dataclass to make it hashable for set usage in Question.competencies. Updated __init__.py files to export domain classes properly.

decisions.decision: Used `is_accessible()` method on Schedule domain model to check datetime window bounds. Converted minutes to seconds in `get_time_limit_seconds()`. Added ScheduleORM to src/orm/__init__.py and schedule_router to main.py.
